ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the company belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company (e.g., San Francisco, California, United States) */,
  "main_phone" TEXT /* Main phone number of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Company address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the company's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the company's details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the company's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry (e.g., Investment Services) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the industry's details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the industry's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executives" (
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executive */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the executive */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the executive */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the executive belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the executive (e.g., Chief Executive Officer) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the executive */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the executive's details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the executive's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("executive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executives_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executive_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive the contact belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the executive */,
  "direct" TEXT /* Direct phone number of the executive */,
  "assistant" TEXT /* Assistant's name and/or phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the executive */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the executive's contact details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the executive's contact details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executive_contacts_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_executives" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the executive in the company */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the executive started in the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the executive ended in the position */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the company-executive relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the company-executive relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, executive) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user's details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Read permission */,
  "write" INTEGER /* Write permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the trend was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the trend was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_trends_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance data */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit of the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the performance data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the performance data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_performance_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executive_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Chief Executive Officer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the position was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the position was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the data version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of the change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data change was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the data change was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_changes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., industry trend, company performance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type FOREIGN KEY ("report_type") REFERENCES company_performance ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type FOREIGN KEY ("report_type") REFERENCES industry_trends ("trend_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the report data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the audit log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the audit log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
